description.value:
While many of your kin still feel the call of the First World, you're drawn to a much newer source of curiosity: the Drift, the artificial plane created by Triune. Your hair shines and sparkles with the phantasmagoric colors of the Machine God's plane. Whether you're a devotee of Triune with a supernatural sense of the plane or a veteran pilot with months of travel logged there, you're at home flying around the chaotic dimension.

You become trained in Piloting. If you would automatically become trained in Piloting (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Navigate] within or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Plot Course] through the Drift, and you reduce the travel time it takes to fly to a destination in or through the Drift by 1 day.
